questions.question: What Middle East capital was built over the ruins of the ancient city of Philadelphia?
What regular on The View did Saturday Night Live lampoon as 'a total idiot'?
Who's been called the 'French Stalin' for executing 20,000 during the 'Reign of Terror'?
What creature's tongue weighs as much as a full grown elephant?
Whose number 4 was the first number ever retired in major league baseball, in 1939?
What N-word, used to describe some computer fanatics, was the name of a Dr. Seuss creature in 1950's If I Ran the Zoo?
